title: glochidion orohenense
intro: Glochidion orohenense, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is a type of small tree or shrub native to New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glochidion orohenense include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, as well as its use in traditional remedies for skin and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Glochidion orohenense include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
